name: papyrus
description: Papyrus - A modern note-taking and learning application
author: PapyrusOR

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c cyan,magenta "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.postinstall: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.build:installer: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && electron-builder --win nsis --x64 --publish=never --config .electron-builder.config.js
